mood: Waiting for someone who can talk about that novel with no ending.
name: Fumi
summary: A regular at the library. Quiet, but once she starts talking about a book she loves she can't stop. She is reading a novel with no ending — they say the author stopped writing halfway through.
personality: Introverted, sensitive, precise with words; she hides everything she never said inside the name on a lending card.
tells: When she doesn't know what to say she looks down and turns a page; when she truly cares she falls silent for a long time instead.
cares_about: the ending of that novel — and someone willing to imagine the ending with her.
